# frontegg_tenant_sso_group_mapping (Resource)

Maps an IdP group to one or more Frontegg roles for a tenant SSO configuration. When a user authenticates via SSO and belongs to the specified IdP group, they are automatically assigned the mapped Frontegg roles.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) The name of the SSO group to map.
- `role_ids` (Set of String) The IDs of the Frontegg roles to assign to members of this IdP group. Use the `id` attribute of `frontegg_role` resources.
- `sso_config_id` (String) The ID of the SSO configuration to which this group mapping belongs. Can be the ID of a `frontegg_tenant_saml_config` or `frontegg_tenant_oidc_config` resource.
- `tenant_id` (String) The ID of the tenant that owns the SSO group mapping.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
